hero.heading: I Build Web Apps That Grow Your Business
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer | Next.js + AI Specialist | Israel
hero.description: From idea to production — I deliver fast, reliable web applications that help businesses attract customers, automate workflows, and scale. Let's turn your vision into results.

webApps.description: Fast, responsive, and beautifully designed web apps that work seamlessly across all devices. From landing pages to complex dashboards.

backendApis.title: Backend & APIs
backendApis.description: Robust server-side systems, databases, and APIs that scale with your business. Reliable, secure, and performant infrastructure.

mobileCrossPlatform.title: Mobile & Cross-Platform
mobileCrossPlatform.description: Build once, deploy everywhere. Progressive Web Apps and responsive designs that deliver native-like experiences on any device.

haderech.title: HaDerech
haderech.description: An interactive learning platform that transforms how students master programming through hands-on practice and community support. Reduces learning time while increasing retention with AI-powered feedback.

portfolio.description: A high-converting developer portfolio that showcases technical excellence through immersive 3D experiences and bilingual content. Designed to turn visitors into clients.

omanut.title: Omanut Website
omanut.description: A professional coaching business website that builds trust through compelling content and testimonials. Full Hebrew support helps reach the target audience effectively.

edutech.title: EduTech Platform
edutech.description: Streamlines educational operations with automated course management and actionable student analytics. Helps instructors focus on teaching, not administration.

hebrewCalendar.title: Hebrew-Gregorian Calendar
hebrewCalendar.description: Eliminates date conversion headaches for users managing both Hebrew and Gregorian calendars. Instant holiday lookups and accurate calculations in an intuitive interface.

items.name: Sarah Cohen
items.content: Elad delivered an exceptional web application that exceeded our expectations. His attention to detail and technical expertise in React and Next.js made the development process smooth and efficient.

items.name: David Levi
items.content: Working with Elad on our educational platform was a great experience. He brought creative solutions to complex problems and delivered a high-quality product on time.

items.name: Maya Shapira
items.content: Elad combines strong technical skills with excellent communication. He understood our business needs and translated them into a beautiful, functional application.

items.name: Yoni Berger
items.content: The portfolio website Elad built for us is both visually stunning and incredibly fast. His use of modern technologies like Framer Motion and Next.js added a premium feel to the project.

present.title: Full-Stack Developer

experience.title: Experience & Expertise
experience.intro: Over the years, I've developed a variety of projects:
experience.haderech: HaDerech - A complete interactive learning platform with course systems, community forums, and practice simulators. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, and AI integrations.
experience.cms: Customer Management Systems - Business applications for managing clients and tasks with Angular and JavaScript
experience.tools: Useful Tools - Like an interactive Hebrew-Gregorian calendar
experience.expertise: My main expertise is in Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Supabase, but I'm also proficient in Angular, PostgreSQL, and working with modern APIs.
experience.beyond: Beyond technology, my experience as a creator, content developer, and businessman taught me to listen to clients, understand real needs, and build solutions that work not just technically, but also from a business perspective.

maturity.title: Maturity & Life Experience
maturity.description: Professional and responsible approach to projects

selfLearning.title: Self-Learning
selfLearning.description: Always up-to-date with the latest technologies

creative.title: Creative Thinking
creative.description: Out-of-the-box solutions thanks to multidisciplinary background

results.title: Results-Oriented
results.description: Focus on what matters, not on hours worked

lookingFor.title: What I'm Looking For
lookingFor.p1: I'm seeking opportunities to work on interesting and challenging projects - whether it's SaaS development, interactive applications, or complex business systems.
lookingFor.p2: I'm particularly interested in projects in education, social tech, and developing tools that help people grow.
lookingFor.p3: If you're looking for an experienced and responsible developer who brings not just technical knowledge, but also business vision and creative thinking - I'd love to hear from you.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.subtitle: A collection of projects showcasing full-stack development, AI integration, and creative problem solving.

haderech.title: HaDerech - Learning Platform
haderech.description: An interactive learning platform that transforms how students master programming through hands-on practice and community support. Reduces learning time while increasing retention with AI-powered feedback and real-time progress tracking.

portfolio.title: Full-Stack Portfolio
portfolio.description: A high-converting developer portfolio that showcases technical excellence through immersive 3D experiences and bilingual content. Optimized for search engines and designed to turn visitors into clients with compelling storytelling.

eyAiKids.title: EY.AI Kids Playground
eyAiKids.description: Safe AI-powered education that sparks creativity in children while giving parents full control. Features age-appropriate content filtering, parental oversight, and engaging story creation that makes learning fun.

omanut.title: Omanut HaKesher
omanut.description: A professional coaching business website that builds trust through compelling content and client testimonials. Full Hebrew RTL support and WhatsApp integration help reach the target audience effectively.

edutech.title: EduTech Platform
edutech.description: Streamlines educational operations with automated course management and actionable student analytics. Helps instructors focus on teaching, not administration, while providing students with engaging interactive content.

hebrewCalendar.title: Hebrew-Gregorian Calendar
hebrewCalendar.description: Eliminates date conversion headaches for users managing both Hebrew and Gregorian calendars. Instant holiday lookups and accurate calculations in an intuitive interface that anyone can use.

ninjaKeyboard.title: Ninja Keyboard
ninjaKeyboard.description: Helps Israeli kids master touch typing in Hebrew with game-based learning that keeps them engaged. Age-appropriate visual themes and progressive difficulty levels make typing practice fun, not frustrating.

bayitBeseder.title: Bayit BeSeder
bayitBeseder.description: Prevents costly home repairs by keeping families on top of maintenance schedules. Gamified task tracking motivates consistent upkeep, protecting property value and peace of mind.

kidushishi.title: Kidushishi Management
kidushishi.description: Simplifies complex event coordination with real-time location tracking and automated scheduling. Dashboard analytics help organizers make data-driven decisions and ensure flawless execution.

voiceChat.title: Voice Chat with Claude
voiceChat.description: Enables natural voice conversations with AI that feel as intuitive as talking to a colleague. Push-to-talk and continuous modes adapt to different use cases, from quick queries to extended brainstorming sessions.

zehutai.title: ZehutAI - Hebrew NLP
zehutai.description: Brings enterprise-grade natural language processing to Hebrew text analysis. RAG-powered insights help businesses understand customer sentiment and extract actionable intelligence from Hebrew content.

whatsappAutomation.title: WhatsApp Automation
whatsappAutomation.description: Saves businesses hours daily by automating WhatsApp messaging workflows. Schedule messages, manage contacts, and provide instant auto-replies without sacrificing the personal touch customers expect.

thanksPage.title: People Who Inspire Me
thanksPage.subtitle: Mentors, educators, and thought leaders in tech & AI who have shaped my journey

yuval.name: Yuval Avidani
yuval.bio: An inspiring AI educator who makes complex concepts accessible through hands-on workshops and community building. A true pioneer in Israel's AI education scene.

avitz.name: Avitz (Avraham Yitzhak Meir)
avitz.bio: A passionate AI content creator bridging the gap between cutting-edge AI developments and the Hebrew-speaking community through engaging, accessible content.

noam.name: Noam Naumovski
noam.bio: A dedicated tech educator who inspires the next generation of developers with practical knowledge and a passion for innovation.

gal.name: Gal Havkin
gal.bio: A talented educator who combines deep technical knowledge with an ability to make complex topics approachable and exciting.

roey.name: Dr. Roey Tzezana
roey.bio: A renowned futurist and author who explores how technology shapes our future. His insights on AI and emerging tech have been a constant source of inspiration.

roi.name: Dr. Roi Yozevitch
roi.bio: A leading AI educator creating comprehensive courses that empower people to harness AI effectively. His teaching makes the world of AI accessible to everyone.

nadav.name: Nadav Neve
nadav.bio: A passionate educator who shares knowledge generously and motivates others to push their boundaries in tech and AI.

guy.name: Guy Aga
guy.bio: A visionary at the intersection of digital marketing and AI, helping professionals and businesses leverage AI tools for real-world impact.
